title: Timeout-Protected Astrology Calculations
essence: Swiss Ephemeris calls wrapped with Promise.race and timeout protection
steps: Wrap all Swiss Ephemeris calls in Promise.race with timeout
Add proper error handling for timeout scenarios
Provide fallback calculations when timeout occurs
tradeoffs: Potential for false timeouts on slow calculations
May lose some calculation accuracy with fallbacks
rollback: Remove timeout protection from native calls

evidence.notes: Prevents server blocking and maintains responsiveness during calculations
